description:
This is a screenshot of the CLC+ Core (Copernicus Land Monitoring Service) web application, specifically the "EAGLE Ontology" section, Version 3.1.2, dated 16.03.2022. The interface displays a hierarchical classification of "Land Cover Components (LCC)".

The top-level LCC categories visible are:
1.  "Abiotic / Non-Vegetated Surfaces and Objects (LCC-1)"
2.  "Biotic / Vegetation (LCC-2)"
3.  "Water (LCC-3)"

The "Abiotic / Non-Vegetated Surfaces and Objects (LCC-1)" category is expanded, revealing its sub-categories:
*   "Artificial Surfaces and Constructions (LCC-1_1)"
    *   "Sealed Artificial Surfaces and Constructions (LCC-1_1_1)"
        *   "Buildings (LCC-1_1_1_1)"
            *   "Conventional Buildings (LCC-1_1_1_1_1)"
            *   "Specific Buildings (LCC-1_1_1_1_2)"
        *   "Specific Structures and Facilities (LCC-1_1_1_2)"
        *   "Open Sealed Surfaces (LCC-1_1_1_3)"
    *   "Non-Sealed Artificial Surfaces (LCC-1_1_2)"
*   "Natural Material Surfaces (LCC-1_2)"

A "Show Details" button is visible next to "Conventional Buildings". The web page header includes navigation links for "Data Catalogue", "EAGLE Ontology", "About EAGLE", "Organisations", and "Users", and indicates the user as "User Admin/Support CLC+ Core". A search bar is present in the main content area.
